description: An MCP server for the Evernote API — manage notes, notebooks, tags, and search across your Evernote account.

environmentVariables.name: EVERNOTE_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Evernote developer token or OAuth access token.

environmentVariables.name: EVERNOTE_SANDBOX
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to use the Evernote sandbox environment for testing.
